param.name: IMG
param.title: Please select a partition. Multiple selection is supported:

param.name: CQ
param.label: Restart device automatically after finishing the process

param.name: CQ1
param.label: Reboot to recovery automatically after finishing the process

param.name: IMG
param.title: Note: Please do not flash partitions such as system

param.name: Brush_in
param.title: You can enter the absolute path of the img file or use the file selector to select the file
param.desc: Tips: You can use [MT Manager] to long press the directory or file --> click Properties --> click the directory to copy the absolute path of the directory, and long press the directory or long press the name to copy the absolute path of the file.
